comments.author: @WhereonEarth4K
comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Yemen episode. Tours, books, coffee, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE YEMEN COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, coffee, and cultural item we'd recommend for this episode → https://amzn.to/4agfSZ0

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN YEMEN*
  ◦ Socotra archipelago tours and regional experiences → https://shorturl.at/IVdbZ
  ◦ Browse all Yemen and Socotra experiences → https://shorturl.at/6SP4L

*📖 PLAN YOUR YEMEN TRIP*
  ◦ Socotra (Bradt Travel Guide), the only current guidebook to the archipelago → https://amzn.to/436MkJB
  ◦ Lonely Planet Middle East Phrasebook for Arabic basics → https://amzn.to/4dB5yx4

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO YEMEN*
  ◦ Yemen: Dancing on the Heads of Snakes by Victoria Clark → https://amzn.to/3Rta4oP
  ◦ The Monk of Mokha by Dave Eggers → https://amzn.to/49o0GJe

*🍲 BRING YEMEN HOME*
  ◦ The Architecture of Yemen and Its Reconstruction by Salma Samar Damluji → https://amzn.to/4e99zZI
  ◦ Port of Mokha Yemen coffee from Mokhtar Alkhanshali's company → https://amzn.to/4ebmaeT

comments.author: @GOBEF3
comments.text:
its my first ever disappointment with "where on earth" :( 
my question is then "where on earth did you get this terrible video ?  great text with nothing to show for... 
surely Yemen has much more to show the world beyond its Houthis missiles attacking the straights ;) 
Do it over please...

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: Yemen is honestly one of the hardest production challenges we face — the gap between what the narration describes and what footage is accessible is wider there than almost anywhere else we've covered. You're right that it shows, and it's on the list for a revisit when the situation allows. Thank you for staying with the channel.

comments.author: @janettesearle3265
comments.text: So glad you don't have music/noise in the background, so I have subscribed.
